commonParams.background: dark gym, black walls, industrial space
commonParams.lighting: dramatic rim lighting, green accent lights, high contrast
commonParams.avoid: no bright commercial gym lighting, no pastels, no yoga aesthetic

hero-gym.prompt: Professional interior photography of a dark industrial strength gym, power racks, barbells, chalk dust in the air, green accent lighting, no people, powerful atmosphere, cinematic wide angle

deadlift-action.prompt: Professional action photography of an athlete mid-deadlift with a loaded barbell, dramatic side lighting showing muscle definition, dark gym background, chalk dust, powerful and intense, cinematic sports photography

sled-push.prompt: Professional action photography of an athlete pushing a weighted sled on artificial turf, determined expression, sweat visible, dark gym background, dramatic lighting, intense training moment, sports editorial

kettlebell.prompt: Professional photography of a row of kettlebells on a dark rubber gym floor, chalk residue, industrial gym background, dramatic overhead spotlight, simple and powerful

boxing-bag.prompt: Professional photography of a heavy boxing bag hanging in a dark gym corner, wrapped hands in frame, dramatic spotlight lighting, gritty and authentic training atmosphere

group-training.prompt: Professional action photography of a small group fitness class doing burpees in a dark gym, dramatic lighting, silhouettes, intense energy, community fitness, cinematic, no identifiable faces

weights-rack.prompt: Professional interior photography of a loaded weight plate rack in a dark gym, iron plates, chalk marks, green accent light strips on the wall, industrial aesthetic, powerful atmosphere
